name: field
hints: An open field with a large dome and a gem. All compass directions lead to warps.
GET GEM. DIG in the field to find something below. Be careful - all N/S/E/W exits warp you.
GET GEM (treasure). DIG creates a hole and drops items below. All four compass directions go to warp (room 17) which may transport you randomly. GO DOME returns inside.
Collect the gem. DIG to access the hole (room 9) below. Avoid compass directions as they all lead to warp. GO DOME to re-enter the tunnel.
notes: Field outside the first dome. Contains *Gem* and a large dome. All N/S/E/W exits warp to room 17. DIG creates a hole (drops items) leading to room 9 below. GO DOME returns to the tunnel.
